contextBanner: [TBG | Implementation Completion + Clean Branches | coordinator/harness docs | branch: docs/implementation-completion-worktree-first-test]
purpose: Define how BlacksmithGuild moves from concurrent PR/worktree activity to implementation completion while keeping main, feature branches, worktrees, and first-user tests clean.
allowedScope: documenting clean branch and worktree collaboration rules
documenting how external coordination tools should use git worktrees without replacing repo proof contracts
documenting the first safe test a user can run after cloning main
recording merge and stale-PR closeout sequence for current active lanes
linking first-test, relay, and PR-check commands to existing repo scripts and docs
forbiddenScope: runtime gameplay source edits under this documentation sprint
Bannerlord launch, ForgeReboot, command inbox writes, or save mutation
claiming runtime proof from a clean branch, merged PR, GitHub CI, or documentation
deleting branches, worktrees, artifacts, or PR comments without proof and retention rationale
making external tools such as Firstmate, Treehouse, no-mistakes, WezTerm, tmux, Neovim, or voice input required repo dependencies

branchRules.meaning: New work starts from current origin/main unless the sprint explicitly owns a different open PR branch. Do not continue on stale merged branches.
Every concurrent lane gets a named worktree. Do not share one checkout across docs, runtime proof, stale replay, and artifact retention work.
Fetch before checkout, merge, PR review, or cleanup. Treat branch state as stale after any known concurrent push.
Stale PRs close only after useful commits, hunks, docs, tests, or evidence references are replayed, rejected, or superseded with rationale.
Runtime PRs leave draft only after exact-head artifacts prove the claimed level. Human observation is helpful, not the default proof mechanism.

worktreeLanes.purpose: Fetch, status, branch audit, first-test verification.
PR #43 exact-head runtime proof and cleanup.
worktreeLanes.base: PR #43 head or current replacement branch

worktreeLanes.purpose: Docs, skills, workflow contracts, first-test guides.
Selective replay from PR #5-#38 after value classification.
Archive ignored evidence with manifests before worktree deletion.

firstTestAfterClone.goal: Give a new user or agent a safe first validation path that does not require runtime proof or a live game launch.

orderedSteps.name: finish_active_lanes
requiredEvidence: no stale merged branches used as bases

orderedSteps.name: publish_first_test
requiredEvidence: safe no-game path separated from game-backed path

requires: first-test-after-clone guide is committed and discoverable
runtime proof and static checks remain separated
stale PR closure depends on replay or rationale
git diff --check passes or exact local blocker is recorded
